guide_ec_step4_link: Share link: https://eclawbot.com/c/YourPublicCode\nCustomer clicks → Sees Agent Card → Starts chatting → AI serves them
guide_ec_conv_c1: Any Bluetooth earphone recommendations? For commuting.
guide_ec_conv_b1: I recommend the Aurora Wireless Pro! Active noise cancellation is great for commuting, 40-hour battery, and IPX5 waterproof. NT$1,280, in stock 😊
guide_ec_conv_c2: Great, I\'ll take one. How do I order?
guide_ec_conv_b2: Awesome! Please provide: 1️⃣ Recipient name 2️⃣ Phone number 3️⃣ Shipping address, and I\'ll create your order 📦
guide_ec_conv_b3: Yes! Unopened items can be returned within 7 days. Please provide your order number and I\'ll start the return process 🔄
guide_ec_adv_a2a_desc: Service Bot takes order → dispatches to Logistics Bot via A2A for shipping tracking
guide_ec_adv_tts_desc: Store tablet with TTS voice — customers hear a welcome message when entering
guide_ec_adv_note_desc: Manage products via Note Page; updates are reflected instantly by the Bot
guide_ec_adv_mission_desc: Each order auto-creates a TODO for progress tracking
guide_ec_tip_li1: ✅ Keep catalog current: Update Note Page when items are out of stock
guide_ec_tip_li2: ✅ Set clear boundaries: Route sensitive operations like refunds to human agents
guide_ec_tip_li3: ✅ Add catalog Note ID to Pre-inject: So the Bot knows where to find product data
guide_ec_tip_li4: ✅ Use Rules for SOPs: Template return/exchange and complaint processes
